text:
ONE WEEK AWAY!! 📣 RSVP at the link in my bio ⬆️⬆️

Listen up, Long Island people… the Ewoks have spoken. And when they speak, we obey. 🤣

So yes — we’re bringing the fluff, the attitude, and the major side eyes to Long Island!!!

📍 Sunday, June 7th
🕐 1 PM
📸 Group Shot 2:30pm
🌳 Hempstead Lake State Park (Eagle Ave entrance off the Southern State Pkwy, go to Parking Lot #3 and walk the trail to Mc Donald Pond. We will be meeting at Mc Donald Pond.

Expect tiny legs moving at questionable speeds, dramatic barking over nothing, and a level of chaos that cannot be contained.

Long Island, brace yourselves.
The Ewoks are pulling up. ✨🐻

#shihtzusofinstagram #shihtzu #shihtzunation #nycshihtzumeetup
